title: Morning Light Adult Korean Swimwear Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Morning Light Adult Korean Swimwear Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Photorealistic 8K morning-light editorial portrait of adult Korean female idol-style model with straight brows, doe eyes, soft blush, and long messy black wavy hair on a white bed. Subject: adult Korean female idol-style model with straight brows, doe eyes, soft blush, and long messy black wavy hair wears white string swimwear set with clean resort editorial styling and holds lying on her stomach, propped on elbows with chin resting on hands, glancing back over her shoulder with a playful natural smile, with consistent adult idol-style face, natural skin texture, glossy pink lips, soft blush, and long black wavy hair. Scene: Shot on Canon R5, 50mm f/1.4, eye-level intimate POV, moderate depth of field with soft bokeh on the background, sharp focus on eyes and face. creates a bright white morning bedroom with soft rumpled linen, white pillow, sheer curtains, overexposed negative space, and warm sunlight. Composition: Fixed 4:5 bed portrait with stomach-down pose, elbows propped, chin on hands, legs relaxed, over-shoulder glance, large white negative space on the right, and sharp focus on eyes and face. Signature Elements: Preserved morning light adult korean swimwear editorial portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Photorealistic resort swimwear editorial, 8K detail, natural adult beauty, warm morning softness, realistic skin texture, and polished magazine finish. Color Palette: Fixed white bed and curtains, warm golden sunlight, natural skin tones, glossy pink lips, black hair, and soft bright neutrals. Lighting: Golden morning sunlight from the right, warm face and upper-body illumination, gentle hair backlight, soft shadows, dust motes, and airy overexposed whites. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
